emails.subject: Corporate Entities
emails.body: Corporate Entities Kate and Teresa: We are working on a time sensitive project and ask that you assist us in determining the names of various Enron entities by doing an historical analysis or whatever means you use. The entities I need info on are: Enron Gas Processing Company Enron Gas Marketing Canada Enron Oil Canada Ltd. Enron Oil Corporation Are these prior names of current Enron entities, are they existing entities, etc.? Please call me if you need any additional info or if my request is confusing. Thanks for your help! Marie x33907

emails.subject: RE: Corporate Entities
emails.body: RE: Corporate Entities I'll start on this immediately, Marie. Kate Kate B. Cole Director, Corporate Services Enron Corp. Tel: (713) 853-1624 Fax: (713) 646-8007 Email: kate.cole@enron.com To: Cole, Kate; Callahan, Teresa

emails.subject: RE: Corporate Entities
emails.body: RE: Corporate Entities See below answers: let me know if you need corporate data sheets or any other info. Kate Kate B. Cole Director, Corporate Services Enron Corp. Tel: (713) 853-1624 Fax: (713) 646-8007 Email: kate.cole@enron.com To: Cole, Kate; Callahan, Teresa

emails.subject: Corporate Entities
emails.body: Corporate Entities Kate: Can you do an historical analysis for Enron Marketing Services Inc. and Enron Oil Trading Transportation? Thanks! Marie

emails.subject: RE: Corporate Entities
emails.body: RE: Corporate Entities 11/1/94 Enron Marketing Services, Inc. changed its name to Engas, Inc. and it was dissolved 6/25/97. Enron Oil Trading Transportation Company is a former name of EOTT Energy Corp., a Delaware entity that merged 3/24/94 out of existence. Chain of events rather complex: 3/24/94 8:00 a.m. Merger of EOTT Energy Corp. (Del. inc.) with and into EOTT Energy Texas, Inc. Name change of EOTT Energy Texas, Inc. to EOTT Energy Corp. 3/24/94 8:05 a.m. Merger of EOTT Energy Corp. (Tex. inc.) creating Transitional Operating Company, Inc., Transitional Common Carrier Company, Inc., and OHS Properties, Inc. 3/24/94 5:10 p.m. Merger of EOTT Energy Corp. (Tex. inc.) into JMRM Energy Corp. (Del.inc.). Let me know if you need more or if you need copies of documents. KC Kate B. Cole Director, Corporate Services Enron Corp. Tel: (713) 853-1624 Fax: (713) 646-8007 Email: kate.cole@enron.com To: Cole, Kate
